initiatives.name: Racial Justice Coalition of San Diego
initiatives.description: A grassroots coalition fostering mutual aid and community power through racial justice organizing in San Diego. They coordinate direct support, advocacy, and solidarity networks while building power through community education, policy reform, and creating spaces for racial equity and systemic change.

initiatives.name: SURJ North County San Diego
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in North County San Diego. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Union del Pueblo Transfronterizo San Diego
initiatives.description: A transborder mutual aid collective building solidarity and support networks across the US-Mexico border. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and community organizing while building power through cross-border solidarity, immigrant rights advocacy, and creating spaces for transnational community care.

initiatives.name: San Diego Brown Berets
initiatives.description: A Chicanx grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through cultural resistance and direct action. They coordinate community defense, education initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through cultural organizing, political education, and creating spaces for Chicanx liberation and community care.

initiatives.name: Indivisible San Diego Persist
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through progressive organizing and direct action in San Diego. They coordinate education initiatives, advocacy campaigns, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, political education, and creating spaces for collective action.

initiatives.name: Change Begins With ME
initiatives.description: A grassroots volunteer group fostering mutual aid and civic engagement through local organizing and collaborative action. They coordinate with frontline organizations on racial, environmental, and social justice initiatives while building power through community education, inclusive activism, and creating spaces for collective change.

initiatives.name: San Diego Black Panther Party
initiatives.description: A revolutionary organization building community power through mutual aid, political education, and direct action in San Diego. They coordinate food distribution programs, community defense initiatives, and solidarity networks while advancing Black liberation and social justice.

initiatives.name: Gente Unida
initiatives.description: A human rights border coalition fostering mutual aid and community support for migrants and refugees. They coordinate education programs, direct assistance, and solidarity networks while building power through advocacy, arts programming, and creating spaces for migrant justice and community care.

initiatives.name: Borderlands for Equity
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity at the US-Mexico border region. They coordinate direct support for migrants and refugees, build power through community organizing, and create spaces for cross-border solidarity and justice.

initiatives.name: Community Advocates for Just and Moral Governance (MoGo)
initiatives.description: A community organization fostering mutual aid and accountability through impact litigation and advocacy. They coordinate legal services, policy initiatives like PrOTECT, and solidarity networks while building power through community empowerment, police accountability, and creating spaces for systemic change.

initiatives.name: Borderlands Relief Collective
initiatives.description: We leave supplies in the borderlands to support human rights, and to decrease the risk of death, for all people who cross through Kumeyaay land.

initiatives.name: Direct Action Drumline
initiatives.description: Protest Drumline, Zine Distro & Mutual Aid

initiatives.name: Anakbayan San Diego
initiatives.description: Filipino youth fighting for national democracy in the Philippines

initiatives.name: Palestinian Youth Movement San Diego
initiatives.description: A movement of Palestinian & Arab youth struggling for the liberation of our homeland.
